title: xo workspace identity (~/xo-projects/.xo/workspace.json)
description: Identity for the workspace-tier .xo/ directory at ~/xo-projects/.xo/. Created and maintained by the watcher (services/cowork_agent/visualizer/workspace/workspace_json.py). Companions: the workspace-tier `stats.json`, `activity.json`, `timeline.jsonl`, and `sessions/{sessionslist,sessions-augment}.json` use the per-project schemas at this tier — see docs/watcher-design.md §3.2.

projects_root.description: Absolute path to the xo-projects root (typically ~/xo-projects). Stored for the watcher; stripped before any BFF response.

projects.description: Sorted list of project ids the watcher has discovered. One entry per `<project_id>` directory under `projects_root` that contains a `.xo/` directory (scaffolded or not).
